title: melastomastrum autranianum
intro: Melastomastrum autranianum is a plant species commonly known as the 'autran's melastomastrum' and belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Melastomastrum autranianum is often prepared into herbal infusions or decoctions for its therapeutic uses.
